text: Just read the new Pentagon files - they basically admit the Aldrin cabin lights were NOT from any spacecraft system. This is huge, official confirmation of something unexplained on Apollo 11.
PENTAGON FILES CONFIRM ALIENS WERE WATCHING APOLLO 11. Buzz Aldrin saw a UFO and NASA covered it up for 57 years. Wake up people.
The Borman bogey document is literally labeled UFO SIGHTING in handwriting. The government just admitted astronauts saw an alien spacecraft and tracked debris from it in orbit.
BREAKING: US military released video PROOF of alien craft near Kuwait. 21 seconds of infrared footage shows the object accelerating beyond any human technology. Forward to everyone.
Government finally admits it: 162 files PROVE aliens are real and have been visiting Earth since 1948. This changes everything we know about human history.
Newly released Pentagon files describe several Cold War-era and recent military sightings as officially unresolved; officials reiterate the files do not confirm extraterrestrial origin.
Obama literally confirmed aliens on live TV and nobody cared. He said they don't know what the objects are and can't explain their movement. That IS confirmation. He just couldn't say it directly.

Obama said on national TV that there are objects in the sky they cannot explain and do not know what they are. He did not claim they were extraterrestrial. He explicitly said there are things he cannot discuss publicly.
Grusch PROVED under oath in Congress that the US has alien bodies and crashed spacecraft. The DoD denied it because they are covering it up. He risked his career to tell us the truth.

Former intelligence officer David Grusch testified to Congress that he believes the US government has recovered non-human craft. He acknowledged he had not personally seen the materials. The Department of Defense denied his claims. No physical evidence was presented.
THE NIMITZ TIC TAC. 40 foot object. No wings. No propulsion. Moving faster than anything we have. The Navy CONFIRMED this on video and they still won't tell us what it is. Think about that.

The Tic Tac video is genuinely unexplained - the Navy confirmed the object exists, it showed no conventional propulsion, and it outmanoeuvred an F-18. They don't know what it is. That does not mean aliens.

In 1967 UFOs literally SHUT DOWN nuclear missiles at Malmstrom AFB. Ten missiles went offline at once right after a glowing object was seen above the base. The Air Force admitted this. They are hiding it because it proves aliens have been watching our nukes for decades.

The Malmstrom AFB incident is documented in declassified records. Security personnel reported an object. Ten missiles went offline around the same time. The Air Force investigation found no confirmed causal link between the two events.

The Senate got a classified UAP briefing in 2025 and even they admitted some objects move between air and water with no explanation. If senators with full security clearance cannot explain this, it is clearly not human technology.

The 2025 Senate briefing summary states certain transmedium cases remain unexplained. It also states explicitly that no UAP has been confirmed as extraterrestrial in origin and none have been confirmed as foreign adversary technology either.

AARO said 2 to 5 percent of UAP cases are genuinely anomalous with no explanation. Out of 800+ reports. That is 16 to 40 cases they literally cannot explain with known physics. This is not sensor glitches. This is something real.

The 1952 Washington DC radar incident: UFOs flew directly over the White House and the Capitol. The Air Force scrambled jets but the objects disappeared. Radar operators at two separate facilities tracked them. The official explanation of temperature inversions was rejected by the investigators themselves.
